sglang.title: [diffusion] refactor: make timestep scheduler request-local
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Introduce batch-local scheduler object
PipelineStages are designed to be of no side-effect (not changing global states outside of Req).
So instead of sharing stage-global scheduler state across requests, scheduler objects should keep mutable denoising loop state (for example step indices and multist

sglang.title: [MoE] Deprecate act_and_mul_triton; fold filter_expert into JIT silu/gelu_and_mul

sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
act_and_mul_triton (in fused_moe_triton_kernels.py) duplicates silu_and_mul / gelu_and_mul. The only difference is that it skips rows whose routed expert id is -1 (the filter_expert=True MoE path used under EP). The JIT CUDA silu_and_mul / gelu_and_mul kernels already exist and are faster

The nixl disagg backend silently drops the model's auxiliary state buffer (kv_args.state_data_ptrs) during the prefill→decode handoff; the mooncake backend already transfers it. On DeepSeek-V4 (SWA hybrid) this collapses GSM8K to 0.10–0.20 vs ~1.00 with the patch.

Fixes #23752
Summary
DeepSeek-V4 chat output contains deterministic spurious tokens (e.g. plain 16, 14:05, <｜end▁of▁file｜> followed by training-data file paths and decode loops) at sentence-boundary positions. Reported in #23752 with this exemplar prompt:

"...Thiopentone is a barbiturate with antic

sglang.title: chore: update CI test est_time values
sglang.author: sglang-bot
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Updates est_time values in CI test registration calls based on the 90th percentile of the last 15 successful executions from scheduled PR Test runs on main.
This keeps the LPT load-balancing algorithm accurate for partitioning tests across parallel CI jobs.

The disagg event loops (event_loop_normal_disagg_prefill, event_loop_overlap_disagg_prefill, event_loop_normal_disagg_decode, event_loop_overlap_disagg_decode)

sglang.title: [AMD]fix: use CUDA event for targeted draft-to-verify sync in EAGLE overlap
sglang.author: AMD-yanfeiwang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
fix issue #21942
Record a CUDA event on main_stream after draft() GPU work is dispatched, then wait_event() on that event at the start of plan_stream in verify(). More targeted than wait_stream(main_stream) since it only ensures plan_stream waits for draft GPU work, not all main_stream ops.

Motivat

sglang.title: [FEAT][EPD] support encoder real health
sglang.author: ZhengWG
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The encoder server's /health endpoint previously only checked whether the encoder object is initialized (encoder is not None). It returned 200 even when the real encode pipeline was broken, making the endpoint unsuitable as a true readiness/liveness probe in production.
Align with the mai

LLaVA family (llava.py / llavavid.py / yivl.py) — add "vision_tower.vision_model.": "vision

sglang.title: [Bug Fix] Reject pp_max_micro_batch_size=0 to prevent silent deadlock on generate()
sglang.author: ppraneth
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
pp_max_micro_batch_size is an Optional[int] CLI argument that defaults to None. When None, Scheduler.__init__ auto-computes a safe value via max(self.max_running_requests // self.pp_size, 1) — always ≥ 1.
Passing an explicit 0 bypassed the is None guard in scheduler.py, leaving pp_max_mic

sglang.title: [AMD] Fix Kimi-K2.6 Quark MXFP4 loading prefix and packed module mapping
sglang.author: ColinZ22
sglang.bodyExcerpt:

Two issues:

DeepseekV3ForCausalLM in KimiK25ForConditionalGeneration was only given the "language_model" prefix when the quant config was "ModelSlimConfig". For Quark MXFP4 checkpoints, the exclude_layers list contains entries prefixed with l

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Size FlashInfer NVLink MNNVL workspace to EP group

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fix FlashInferNVLinkOneSidedManager and FlashInferNVLinkTwoSidedManager so the MNNVL workspace is sized to the EP group instead of the DP group.
In both managers, the flashinfer-allocated workspace tensor's leading dimension is determined by the comm_backend's group size (via MnnvlMemory.set

vllm.author: omerpaz95
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Support P/D (Prefill/Decode) disaggregation in the OffloadingConnector by ensuring the prefill instance offloads all KV blocks to CPU — not just the incremental delta since the last store.

vllm.title: [torch.compile]: Disable Sequence Parallelism (SP) for piecewise compilation
vllm.author: SouthWest7
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Disable Sequence Parallelism for piecewise compilation in v1, and only keep SP enabled for full-graph compilation paths.
This change adds an explicit config-level guard so that when v1 is using Dynamo FX-level graph splitting, enable_sp and fuse_gemm_comms are turned off early. The SP-relate

vllm.title: Auto-disable expandable_segments around cumem memory pool
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Remove the hard assertion in CuMemAllocator.__init__ that forbade PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True when sleep mode is in use.
In CuMemAllocator.use_memory_pool, detect expandable_segments:True on entry and toggle it off via torch.cuda.memory._set_allocator_settings(\"expanda

vllm.title: [Model Runner V2] Fix rejection sampling acceptance rate gap vs MRV1
vllm.author: TheEpicDolphin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Context
Currently, MRV1 does not use the true draft logits for rejection sampling. Instead, it samples draft tokens via argmax, essentially treating the draft probability distribution, q(x), as one-hot. This changes the standard rejection sampling ratio probability test from u < p(x) / q(x) to u < p

vllm.title: [Tests] Gate Isaac under Transformers v5
vllm.author: SiluPanda
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
What this PR does / why we need it
Adds a Transformers v5 version gate for IsaacForConditionalGeneration in the model test registry.
The Isaac checkpoints still rely on custom Hub code that is not fully compatible with Transformers v5. The linked issue notes that this should be resolved sustainably

Purpose
Fixes #39734 (and the same root cause that motivates #39866 / #40027): on hybrid full + sliding-window models with the pool sized at the startup minimum, runtime admission rejects long-but-fittable prompts because the SWA admission gate budgets the full sequence even though SlidingWindowMana

Purpose
Adds integration tests for the Cutlass W4A16 (Machete) kernel on Hopper (sm_90) GPUs. The existing test_machete_mm.py tests only exercise the raw CUDA kernel (ops.machete_mm) in isolation. These new tests verify the full vllm pipeline — from model loading through kernel selection to inferenc

Purpose
For visual understanding workloads with large images and relatively short text prompts/generation, the ViT encoder attention becomes a significant bottleneck, especially when the text model is quantized, e.g. with nvfp4. This PR adds optional FP8 quantization for ViT encoder attention via th
